title: Completing your Quarterly Building Activity Survey | Stats NZ
content:
## Completing your Quarterly Building Activity Survey

## ‘Before you begin’ checklist
You will need the following information before you begin:
- Confirm whether the building consent details provided in the survey are correct (these are also provided in the email and/or letter requests for the survey).
- The current project status.
- The total cost of building work done at the end of the latest quarter. Work done includes professional fees for architects, engineers, quantity surveyors, other consultants, and construction costs for general site preparation, materials, and the cost of labour (including sub-contractors). Work done does not include the cost of land, lawyers’ fees, legal fees for raising finance, and consent fees.
- Work done includes professional fees for architects, engineers, quantity surveyors, other consultants, and construction costs for general site preparation, materials, and the cost of labour (including sub-contractors).
- Work done does not include the cost of land, lawyers’ fees, legal fees for raising finance, and consent fees.

## Accessing the survey
Type the link from your survey email or letter into the address bar of the browser you are using. Press enter to reach the home page of the survey.
Your link has the following format: https://survey.stats.govt.nz/r/XXXXXXX .
If you don’t land on the home page of the survey, check you have:
- entered the link correctly.
- entered the link into the browser address bar rather than a search engine.
- used a browser listed in the ‘Online requirements’ section of the About the Building Activity Survey page.
If you are still unable to access the login page, try closing your internet session and starting again.

## Important information
- While we encourage you to use the checklist to gather all the information you need to complete the survey in one sitting, you can start and resume the survey where you left off. Your progress will be saved each time you click ‘Continue’ and move to a new section. If you choose to leave and reaccess your survey, you can resume by using the same unique url provided to you in the email and/or letter request.
- You can download a copy of your completed survey by clicking on the ‘Select here to download a copy ofyour response for your records’ link at the top of the last page after you have submitted your response. Once you leave this page you will not be able to access the information you have submitted.
- Additional help can be found by visiting Help with completing your survey online .
- What you need to know about the Quarterly Building Activity Survey Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 104 KB
